name: open-devops-skills
description: Open DevOps Skills for Claude Code and Codex — infrastructure cost optimization, K8s troubleshooting, and more for SRE teams.

interface.shortDescription: DevOps and SRE skill pack — infrastructure cost optimization and K8s troubleshooting.
interface.longDescription: Production-ready DevOps skills for SRE and platform engineering teams. Currently includes ICO (Infra Cost Optimizer) for zombie/idle resource detection and safe decommission across 8 resource types.
